mapper.insert:
insert into ecm_app_doc_rel(id, app_code, doc_code,doc_sort,type) values
(#{it.id},#{it.appCode}, #{it.docCode}, #{it.docSort},#{it.type})
mapper.select: SELECT doc_code, doc_name, doc_id FROM ecm_busi_doc WHERE doc_code IN ( SELECT eadr.doc_code FROM ecm_app_doc_rel eadr LEFT JOIN ecm_doc_def edd ON eadr.doc_code = edd.doc_code WHERE app_code = #{appCode} AND type = 1 ) AND busi_id = #{busiId}

SELECT doc_code, doc_name, doc_id FROM ecm_busi_doc WHERE doc_code IN ( SELECT eadr.doc_code FROM ecm_app_doc_rel eadr LEFT JOIN ecm_doc_def edd ON eadr.doc_code = edd.doc_code WHERE app_code = #{appCode} AND type = 1 ) AND busi_id = #{busiId}
